title: clitoria rubiginosa var. ecostata
intro: Clitoria rubiginosa var. ecostata, also known as butterfly pea or Asian pigeonwings, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clitoria rubiginosa var. ecostata include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used as a natural food coloring due to its vibrant blue color when used with an alkaline substance.
